title: serv's hotbar gui hud ui whatever
description: Square like bar UI / HUD / GUI / HOTBAR whatever honestly, I made it for myself so enjoy it. SUPPORTS APPLESKIN.
body:
A resourcepack to make your bars look Square for Minecraft 1.20.4+, It's a somewhat material design and will have a better version in the future.

![hotbar ui (supports appleskin)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/vu8U6tDg/images/1409c6dd6fb525a590495515379bb60753c9bfc5.png)

version 2.0
![version 2.0](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/vu8U6tDg/images/3d68e267584a031b02ff381861a5350e2bae2294.png)

(cool font recommended to use since it makes it look slick)

Only changes hotbar, feel free to use anywhere or modify/integrate. (Just credit me pls)

+ SUPPORTS APPLESKIN
